---
title: Notes
description: Short notes, slides, and scratchpads.
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
listing:
  contents: notes/*.qmd
  sort: false
  type: default   # "grid" にすればカード表示
  fields: [title, date, description]
---

![](static/carpediem.png){fig-align="center"}

[フリードリヒ・ハイエク『経済学者として生きるということ』日本語訳](onbeing.qmd)

[Amor Angelorum Lapsorum: Evangelium Saeculi Sine Deo](gospel.qmd)

[Note on Boppart and Krusell (2020, Section V.B)](pdf/BK2020JPEGHH.pdf)

[Note on the Existence of Stationary Distributions in Finite-State Markov Chains](pdf/markov_finite.pdf)

[Note on the Existence of Stationary Distributions for Markov Chains with Infinite State Spaces](pdf/markov_infinite.pdf)

[プロジェクトノートテンプレート](projectnote.qmd)

[マクロ経済学 Reading List](Macro_reading.qmd)
